Hi, I'm Monika

My journey into yoga wasn't just about movement; it was a path to healing. After discovering how deep breathing and mindful flow could transform my own physical and mental well-being, I realized my true passion: sharing this gift with the world.

Based globally and operating in IST, I've dedicated my life to helping others find their inner peace and holistic health through the convenience of online practice. Whether you're a beginner or looking to deepen your practice, I'm here to guide you toward a stronger, calmer, and more balanced version of yourself.

What We Practice Together

Power Yoga

Build functional strength and burn calories through dynamic movements.

Hatha Yoga

Find your center with traditional postures focused on balance and flexibility.

Pranayama

Master the art of breathing to achieve mental calm and absolute clarity.

Meditation

Quiet the noisy mind and reduce daily stress through guided mindfulness.

Fitness & Wellness

A holistic approach to health that nurtures your body and mind from the inside out.

Your Schedule. Your Yoga.

No more missing classes because life got busy

Morning today, evening tomorrow—the choice is always yours. Attend any batch that fits your changing daily rhythm.

Enrolled for 6 AM but slept in? Simply join the 7 AM session instead. We provide the structure; you provide the timing.

One membership. All batches. Enjoy complete freedom with zero restrictions on your journey to healing and inner peace.

Find a session that fits your lifestyle. Switch between any batch at your convenience.
